productDisplayName: Esprit Men Axis Black Steel Watches
description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This classic Axis analog wrist watch from esprit is no exception. Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: Round Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap with tang clasp Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass Black dial with numbered hour markings and date and day socket near 3 o& rsquo clock marking Quartz movement of time display Fluorescent hour markings and hands for easy viewing of time in low light conditions Screw to reset time, day and date Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters that allows you to use it when washing hands or your car
